subject: [PATCH v3 13/16] selftests/mm: add userfaultfd RWP tests

2026-05-23.patch_summary: This patch adds userfaultfd (UFFD) read-write protect (RWP) tests to the Linux kernel selftests suite. The tests cover various scenarios, including asynchronous and synchronous modes, page mapping, memory protection, and fork operations. They verify that RWP works correctly in different situations, such as when pages are accessed or modified, and when processes are created or terminated. The patch includes 11 test cases that run against anonymous, shared memory, and huge pages to ensure the correctness of UFFD's RWP feature.
